Audio codec of the sound track when transcoding. AAC is efficient and very widely compatible; AC3 is mainly interesting for 5.1/TV; 'Keep original' copies the audio track unchanged.

Bei gleichem Zeitstempel-Dateinamen wird: When timestamp filenames collide – provided the image contains milliseconds (sub-seconds) – a suffix like .450ms is used (e.g. 20260505_155603.450ms.jpg) instead of -2, -3 … Without milliseconds the numeric counter remains.
Bei gleichem Zeitstempel-Namen: falls da: When timestamp names collide: if the image contains sub-seconds (milliseconds), use them as a suffix (e.g. 20260505_155603.450ms.jpg) instead of -2, -3 …
Beim HEIC→JPG-Konvertieren die Tiefen-Ma: When converting HEIC→JPG, embed the depth map as Google GDepth (XMP) into the JPG so it remains reusable later.

Setzt FileCreateDate/FileModifyDate und: Sets FileCreateDate/FileModifyDate and the real filesystem timestamps to the local capture time. The time matches the local time also used for the target filename; on Windows the creation time is set as well, on Unix systems at least modify/access time.
Setzt die echten Dateisystem-Zeitstempel: Sets the real filesystem timestamps to the local capture time, matching the filename.
Spaltenkopf anklicken, um zu filtern (Te: Click a column header to filter (text + value list).
Steuert die Toleranz für Zeitstempel-Abw: Controls the tolerance for timestamp deviations and the check period for planned captures.
Steuert, welche Arbeitsschritte der Lauf:
Controls which work steps the run may perform at all:
• Full normalize: image/video conversion, metadata writing, and rename
• Rename only: metadata writing and renaming only, no media conversion
• Samsung cleanup only: only Samsung-specific cleanup tags and no conversion
• Samsung + GPS cleanup: Samsung and GPS cleanup, likewise without media conversion
Tiefe beim Konvertieren als GDepth ins J: Embed depth as GDepth into the JPG when converting
Transcode zu HEVC/x265 MP4, Bucket {buck: Transcode video to HEVC/x265 MP4, bucket {bucket}, CRF {crf}
UI-Optionen und Parallelität für interak: UI options and parallelism for interactive previews, image processing and ExifTool reads.
Video auf maximal 30 FPS begrenzen: Limit video to a maximum of 30 FPS
Video auf Full HD herunterskalieren, Sei: Downscale video to Full HD while preserving aspect ratio.
Videos über 30 fps werden im selben FFmp: Videos above 30 fps are reduced to 30 fps in the same FFmpeg run; lower frame rates are not increased.
Videos above 30 fps are reduced to 30 fps in the same FFmpeg transcode. Videos at 30 fps or below retain their original frame rate.
Videos über Full HD werden beim Apply zu: Videos above Full HD are additionally downscaled during Apply without changing the aspect ratio.
Vorlagen für Links/Rechts-Vergleiche. Ve: Templates for left/right comparisons. Use $source for left/backup/before and $target for right/current/after.
Wenn aktiv, werden Videos über Full HD z: When enabled, videos above Full HD are additionally scaled down to at most 1920x1080, keeping the aspect ratio.
Wird eine Tiefen-HEIC doch nach JPG konv: If a depth HEIC is converted to JPG after all, the depth map is embedded into the JPG as Google GDepth (XMP) and thus remains reusable.
Zeichne mit dem Polygon-Werkzeug (oben l: Use the polygon tool (top left on the map) to draw an area around your trip. Media without GPS in the same time window are added automatically.
